channel.title: Books on Theo van Stratum, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in Books on Theo van Stratum, PhD

item.title: Probabilistic Delivery
item.description: The definitive challenge to Agile theatre. Drawing on data from 200+ software projects, this book introduces the Probabilistic Delivery framework — replacing story-point velocity with actuarial rigour.

item.title: The Gambler's Fallacy
item.description: A deep investigation into the cognitive biases and statistical misconceptions that undermine decision-making in software organisations — and how Bayesian tools can systematically correct them.

item.title: The Technical Debt Paradox
item.description: An unflinching examination of technical debt as a measurable, probabilistic risk — not a vague metaphor — with empirical data showing organisations how to price, manage, and strategically deploy it as a fiduciary instrument.

item.title: Pandas for Academics
item.description: The first comprehensive, discipline-neutral pandas textbook written for academic researchers — covering the full research lifecycle from raw data to publication-ready results.

item.title: Probabilistic Python
item.description: The Python answer to McElreath’s Statistical Rethinking — academically rigorous, practically oriented, written for researchers who need probabilistic methods in their own disciplines.
